name: Pinhead Gunpowder
description: '''Pinhead Gunpowder''' is an American [[punk rock]] band that formed in the [[East Bay (San Francisco Bay Area)|East Bay]] area of [[California]], in 1991. The band currently consists of [[Aaron Cometbus]] (drums, [[lyrics]]), [[Bill Schneider (musician)|Bill Schneider]] (bass), [[Billie Joe Armstrong]] (guitar, vocals) and [[Jason White (musician, born 1973)|Jason White]] (guitar, vocals). The band's name comes from a brand of "high-octane" green tea served at the [[Arcata]] [[Food cooperative|co-op]] that was discovered by Aaron Cometbus during one of his many [[dumpster diving]] adventures.
